headline: TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc. Sees Strong Interest In Its Solutions at INTERPHEX 2026
summary: Company Showcases SteraMist iHP Automation to Industry Giants Including Amgen, Merck, and Moderna; Finalizes Custom Engineering Contract for Proprietary Healthcare SystemFREDERICK, Md., April 27, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- TOMI Environmental Solutions, Inc.® (“TOMI”) (NASDAQ: TOMZ), a global leader in disinfection and decontamination solutions, saw strong interest in its solutions at “INTERPHEX 2026” reflecting broader market awareness and acceptance of its products and positioning the Company to
